leadText: Gothitelle (Japanese: ゴチルゼル Gothiruselle) is a Psychic-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Gothorita starting at level 41. It is the final form of Gothita.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Gothitelle's legs seen from below Gothitelle is a humanoid Pokémon with a primarily black body. Its head is teardrop-shaped, with a white, bow-like fixture attached to the base of its tip. The black skin on Gothitelle's head opens onto its purple face with a zigzag pattern resembling bangs. Gothitelle has large, heavy-lidded eyes with blue irises and white pupils, as well as a small mouth with red lips. Four flat, black disks flank each side of its head. Gothitelle's body is split into four progressively-larger tiers, with its head and arms being attached to the smallest, uppermost tier and with a pair of stubby pink feet being under them. Its arms are thin, ending in small, purple hands with white disks at the wrists. Each tier of Gothitelle's body has a white, bow-like fixture on its front. Gothitelle's immense psychic power can distort the space around it, showing visions of distant stars and past events , but it dislikes conflict. It can predict the future from the placement and movement of stars and weeps when it discovers the lifespan of its Trainer. It has a detached nature due to seeing how all life will eventually end. A criminal that a Gothitelle had shown his fate to went missing that same day and was never seen again. The visions Gothitelle shares are said to be apparently ethereal and beautiful. Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Gothitelle evolves from Gothorita and is the final form of Gothita . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Gothita Psychic → First Evolution Gothorita Psychic → Second Evolution Gothitelle Psychic

She's also initially in charge of Wish Park's Power Zone and the Power Bash Attraction, but leaves Haxorus in charge of them during the post-game. Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation V. Generation V Unova B W : #082 Unova B2 W2 : #138 Black Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power. White They can predict the future from the placement and movement of the stars. They can see Trainers' life spans. Black 2 It can see the future from the movement of the stars. When it learns its Trainer's life span, it cries in sadness. White 2 Generation VI Central Kalos #— Coastal Kalos #— Mountain Kalos #128 Hoenn #— X Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power. Y They can predict the future from the placement and movement of the stars. They can see Trainers' life spans. Omega Ruby Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power. Alpha Sapphire They can predict the future from the placement and movement of the stars. They can see Trainers' life spans. Generation VII Alola #— Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Generation VII . Generation VIII Galar #269 Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #053 Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Sword It has tremendous psychic power, but it dislikes conflict. It's also able to predict the future based on the movement of the stars. Shield A criminal who was shown his fate by a Gothitelle went missing that same day and was never seen again. Generation IX Paldea #236 Kitakami #— Blueberry #103 Lumiose #— Hyperspace #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Legends: Z-A . Scarlet Gothitelle unleashes psychic energy and shows opponents dreams of the universe’s end. These dreams are apparently ethereal and beautiful. Violet It gazes at the stars to predict the future. It acts somewhat detached because it has seen the end of all existence. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry BW021 Gothitelle Ash's Pokédex Gothitelle, the Astral Body Pokémon. Gothitelle's Psychic power is so great that it is said to warp space around it, and distort reality in the process.
